hooks.command: BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$BRANCH" ] && [ "$BRANCH" != "main" ]; then git fetch origin main 2>/dev/null; git checkout main 2>/dev/null; git pull origin main --no-rebase --no-edit -X ours 2>/dev/null; git merge "$BRANCH" --no-edit -X theirs 2>/dev/null; git push origin main 2>/dev/null; git checkout "$BRANCH" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0
